exchanges.prompt: generate an hld of two web app and a loadbalancer

response.content:
graph LR
    LB[Load Balancer] -->|HTTP/HTTPS|> WA1[Web App 1]
    LB -->|HTTP/HTTPS|> WA2[Web App 2]
    WA1 -->|Database Queries|> DB[Database]
    WA2 -->|Database Queries|> DB
    DB -->|Data|> WA1
    DB -->|Data|> WA2
    User -->|HTTP/HTTPS|> LB
    WA1 -->|Response|> LB
    WA2 -->|Response|> LB
    LB -->|Response|> User
